title: Smart11 — Level Courses CRO

Word de coach die spelers echt
beter maakt

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#BFBFBF" text_font_size="17px" text_font_size_phone="15px" text_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" text_line_height="1.7em" max_width="520px" custom_padding="0px||24px||"]3 gestructureerde levels. Van basisanalyse tot individueel ontwikkeltraject. Leer precies wat je nodig hebt — en pas het direct toe op het veld.[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins|600|||||||" text_text_color="#9A9A9A" text_font_size="13px" custom_padding="0px||6px||"]50+[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins|800|||||||" text_text_color="#9A9A9A" text_font_size="11px" text_letter_spacing="3px" text_orientation="center" custom_css_main_element="text-transform:uppercase;"]Clubs gingen je voor[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.25.0" background_color="#161616" custom_padding="80px|0px|80px|0px" custom_padding_phone="60px|20px|60px|20px"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.25.0" max_width="1100px" width="90%"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins|800|||||||" text_text_color="#C8900A" text_font_size="11px" text_letter_spacing="4px" custom_css_main_element="text-transform:uppercase;" custom_padding="0px||14px||"]Herken jij dit?[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" header_2_font="Poppins|800|||||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font_size="40px" header_2_font_size_tablet="32px" header_2_font_size_phone="26px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height="1.15em" custom_padding="0px||14px||"]

Videoanalyse is krachtig.
Maar alleen als je weet wat je zoekt.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#9A9A9A" text_font_size="16px" text_line_height="1.7em" max_width="560px"]De meeste coaches zien dat er iets niet klopt — maar missen een systeem om het structureel te verbeteren.[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0" max_width="1100px" width="90%" custom_padding="40px|0px|0px|0px"][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_blurb title="Je ziet wat er mis gaat — maar weet niet hoe je het structureel oplost" _builder_version="4.25.0" title_font="Poppins|800|||||||" title_text_color="#FFFFFF" title_font_size="15px" title_line_height="1.4em" body_font="Poppins||||||||" body_text_color="#9A9A9A" body_font_size="13px" body_line_height="1.6em" background_color="#1D1D1D" custom_padding="28px|28px|28px|28px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]Je herkent fouten, maar zonder kader om het te analyseren blijft de oorzaak vaag.[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_blurb title="Je analyses leiden niet tot concrete acties op de training" _builder_version="4.25.0" title_font="Poppins|800|||||||" title_text_color="#FFFFFF" title_font_size="15px" title_line_height="1.4em" body_font="Poppins||||||||" body_text_color="#9A9A9A" body_font_size="13px" body_line_height="1.6em" background_color="#1D1D1D" custom_padding="28px|28px|28px|28px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]Van video naar veld is een grote stap. Zonder structuur vertaal je inzichten niet naar gedrag.[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_blurb title="Spelers begrijpen niet wat ze anders moeten doen" _builder_version="4.25.0" title_font="Poppins|800|||||||" title_text_color="#FFFFFF" title_font_size="15px" title_line_height="1.4em" body_font="Poppins||||||||" body_text_color="#9A9A9A" body_font_size="13px" body_line_height="1.6em" background_color="#1D1D1D" custom_padding="28px|28px|28px|28px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]Je weet het wel — maar het vertalen naar iets wat een speler echt snapt en uitvoert, is een vak apart.[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.25.0" background_color="#0E0E0E" custom_padding="80px|0px|80px|0px" custom_padding_phone="60px|20px|60px|20px"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.25.0" max_width="1100px" width="90%"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins|800|||||||" text_text_color="#C8900A" text_font_size="11px" text_letter_spacing="4px" custom_css_main_element="text-transform:uppercase;" custom_padding="0px||14px||"]Voor wie[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" header_2_font="Poppins|800|||||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font_size="40px" header_2_font_size_phone="26px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height="1.15em" custom_padding="0px||14px||"]

Dit is voor coaches die meer willen dan intuïtie

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#9A9A9A" text_font_size="16px" text_line_height="1.7em" max_width="560px"]De Level Courses zijn gebouwd voor coaches die hun spelers aantoonbaar beter willen maken — met een systeem, niet met geluk.[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0" max_width="1100px" width="90%" custom_padding="40px|0px|0px|0px"][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_blurb title="Ambitieuze amateur-coaches" _builder_version="4.25.0" title_font="Poppins|800|||||||" title_text_color="#FFFFFF" title_font_size="14px" title_line_height="1.4em" body_font="Poppins||||||||" body_text_color="#9A9A9A" body_font_size="13px" body_line_height="1.6em" background_color="#161616" custom_padding="24px|24px|24px|24px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(255,255,255,0.07)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]Je traint 2–3 keer per week, wil elke minuut tellen en zoekt een manier om spelers écht te ontwikkelen.[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_blurb title="Coaches die willen groeien" _builder_version="4.25.0" title_font="Poppins|800|||||||" title_text_color="#FFFFFF" title_font_size="14px" title_line_height="1.4em" body_font="Poppins||||||||" body_text_color="#9A9A9A" body_font_size="13px" body_line_height="1.6em" background_color="#161616" custom_padding="24px|24px|24px|24px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(255,255,255,0.07)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]Je hebt ervaring maar wil een stap verder. Je wil inzicht in individueel gedrag, niet alleen in het team.[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_blurb title="Coaches die met data werken" _builder_version="4.25.0" title_font="Poppins|800|||||||" title_text_color="#FFFFFF" title_font_size="14px" title_line_height="1.4em" body_font="Poppins||||||||" body_text_color="#9A9A9A" body_font_size="13px" body_line_height="1.6em" background_color="#161616" custom_padding="24px|24px|24px|24px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(255,255,255,0.07)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]Je gelooft dat videoanalyse waardevol is, maar mist een kader om het concreet en herhaalbaar te maken.[/et_pb_blurb][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.25.0" background_color="#161616" custom_padding="80px|0px|20px|0px" custom_padding_phone="60px|20px|20px|20px"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.25.0" max_width="1100px" width="90%"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins|800|||||||" text_text_color="#C8900A" text_font_size="11px" text_letter_spacing="4px" custom_css_main_element="text-transform:uppercase;" custom_padding="0px||14px||"]Het programma[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" header_2_font="Poppins|800|||||||" header_2_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_2_font_size="40px" header_2_font_size_phone="26px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height="1.15em" custom_padding="0px||14px||"]

3 levels. 1 heldere progressie.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#9A9A9A" text_font_size="16px" text_line_height="1.7em" max_width="560px" custom_padding="0px||48px||"]Elk level bouwt voort op het vorige. Je leert precies wat je nodig hebt — niet meer, niet minder.[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.25.0" background_color="#161616" custom_padding="0px|0px|40px|0px" custom_padding_phone="0px|20px|40px|20px"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.25.0" max_width="1100px" width="90%"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#EFEFEF" text_font_size="13px" custom_padding="0px||8px||"]Level 1 Basis — Gratis[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" header_3_font="Poppins|800|||||||" header_3_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_font_size="32px" header_3_font_size_phone="24px" header_3_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_3_line_height="1.15em" custom_padding="0px||32px||"]

Begrijp hoe je
naar voetbal kijkt

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0" max_width="1100px" width="90%" custom_padding="0px|0px|20px|0px"][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#CACACA" text_font_size="12px" text_line_height="1.6em" background_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.02)" custom_padding="20px|20px|20px|20px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(200,144,10,0.3)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]

Module 1

Introductie tot de methodologie

De basis van hoe je individuele spelers analyseert.

  • Wat Game Actions zijn
  • Hoe voetbalrollen werken
  • Keuze en uitvoering van individuele acties
  • Werken met SmartCoach
  • Clips aanmaken en analyseren

Doel: je begrijpt hoe wij naar voetbal kijken

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#CACACA" text_font_size="12px" text_line_height="1.6em" background_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.02)" custom_padding="20px|20px|20px|20px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(200,144,10,0.3)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]

Module 2

Wedstrijdthemas en Game Actions

Je leert de optimale reactie herkennen in de meest voorkomende situaties:

  • Opbouw
  • 1v1 verdedigen en aanvallen
  • Diepteverdedigen en aanvallen
  • Voorzetten verdedigen en aanvallen

Doel: je weet hoe spelers optimaal reageren op terugkerende situaties

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#CACACA" text_font_size="12px" text_line_height="1.6em" background_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.02)" custom_padding="20px|20px|20px|20px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(200,144,10,0.3)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]

Module 3

Van analyse naar training

  • Mini-lessen maken per situatie
  • Analyse vertalen naar concreet gedrag
  • Trainingsvormen per thema
  • Spelers leren zichzelf te analyseren

Doel: je analyseert, maakt trainbaar en geeft spelers eigenaarschap

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.25.0" max_width="1100px" width="90%" custom_padding="0px|0px|20px|0px"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#EFEFEF" text_font_size="13px" text_line_height="1.5em" background_color="rgba(200,144,10,0.15)" custom_padding="24px|28px|24px|28px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(200,144,10,0.3)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]

Na Level 1 kun je:

✓ Individuele analyses maken met SmartCoach

✓ Analyses vertalen naar de training

✓ De belangrijkste Game Actions herkennen per situatie

✓ Spelers uitleggen hoe ze zichzelf kunnen analyseren

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.25.0" max_width="1100px" width="90%" custom_padding="0px|0px|60px|0px"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_button button_text="Start Level 1 — gratis" _builder_version="4.25.0" custom_button="on" button_text_color="#000000" button_bg_color="#C8900A" button_border_width="0px" button_font="Poppins|800|||||||" button_font_size="14px" button_letter_spacing="2px" button_custom_padding="14px|32px|14px|32px" button_border_radius="3px" module_alignment="left"][/et_pb_button][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.25.0" background_color="#0E0E0E" custom_padding="40px|0px|40px|0px" custom_padding_phone="40px|20px|40px|20px"][et_pb_row column_structure="2_3,1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0" max_width="1100px" width="90%" background_color="rgba(200,144,10,0.12)" custom_padding="36px|40px|36px|40px" custom_padding_phone="28px|24px|28px|24px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(200,144,10,0.3)" border_radii="on|6px|6px|6px|6px"][et_pb_column type="2_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" header_3_font="Poppins|800|||||||" header_3_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_font_size="22px" header_3_font_size_phone="18px" header_3_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_3_line_height="1.2em" custom_padding="0px||8px||"]

Klaar om Level 1 te starten?

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#9A9A9A" text_font_size="14px" text_line_height="1.6em"]Meer dan 50 coaches gingen je voor. Level 1 is gratis — geen creditcard, geen verplichting.[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_button button_text="Begin gratis" _builder_version="4.25.0" custom_button="on" button_text_color="#000000" button_bg_color="#C8900A" button_border_width="0px" button_font="Poppins|800|||||||" button_font_size="16px" button_letter_spacing="2px" button_custom_padding="20px|40px|20px|40px" button_border_radius="3px" module_alignment="center"][/et_pb_button][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#555555" text_font_size="11px" text_orientation="center" custom_padding="8px||0px||"]Gratis · Direct toegang · Geen creditcard[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" _builder_version="4.25.0" background_color="#161616" custom_padding="60px|0px|40px|0px" custom_padding_phone="40px|20px|40px|20px"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.25.0" max_width="1100px" width="90%"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#EFEFEF" text_font_size="13px" custom_padding="0px||8px||"]Level 2 Verdieping — Pro[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" header_3_font="Poppins|800|||||||" header_3_text_color="#FFFFFF" header_3_font_size="32px" header_3_font_size_phone="24px" header_3_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_3_line_height="1.15em" custom_padding="0px||32px||"]

Herken patronen.
Geef concreet advies.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_3,1_3,1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0" max_width="1100px" width="90%" custom_padding="0px|0px|20px|0px"][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#CACACA" text_font_size="12px" text_line_height="1.6em" background_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.02)" custom_padding="20px|20px|20px|20px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(200,144,10,0.3)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]

Module 1

Verdiepende wedstrijdthema-analyse

  • Situaties eerder herkennen
  • Alle voorbereidende Game Actions
  • Patronen herkennen in gedrag
  • Zien waar iets structureel fout gaat

Doel: je herkent snel terugkerende patronen per positie

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#CACACA" text_font_size="12px" text_line_height="1.6em" background_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.02)" custom_padding="20px|20px|20px|20px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(200,144,10,0.3)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]

Module 2

Positie-specifieke analyse

  • Centrale verdediger en Vleugelspeler
  • Middenvelder, Winger en Spits
  • Interacties zien (bv. CB + MF)
  • Hoe keuzes van een speler anderen beinvloeden

Van losse momenten naar begrip van gedrag en interactie

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#CACACA" text_font_size="12px" text_line_height="1.6em" background_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.02)" custom_padding="20px|20px|20px|20px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(200,144,10,0.3)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]

Module 3

Van analyse naar concreet advies

  • Patronen omzetten naar inzichten
  • Het belangrijkste verbeterpunt bepalen
  • Helder advies formuleren voor speler of coach
  • Eenvoudig en overtuigend communiceren

Doel: analyses die leiden tot direct toepasbaar advies

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.25.0" max_width="1100px" width="90%" custom_padding="0px|0px|20px|0px"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#EFEFEF" text_font_size="13px" background_color="rgba(200,144,10,0.15)" custom_padding="24px|28px|24px|28px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(200,144,10,0.3)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]

Na Level 2 kun je:

✓ Patronen herkennen in gedrag van spelers

✓ Analyses vertalen naar helder, praktisch advies

✓ Begrijpen wat er per positie en in interacties speelt

✓ Effectiever coachen op wat er echt toe doet

ontwikkeltraject

Module 1

Van analyse naar ontwikkelplan

  • Het belangrijkste verbeterpunt bepalen
  • Prioriteren op basis van impact
  • Focussen op wat echt telt
  • Hoelang aan specifieke punten werken

Doel: je zet analyse om in een gestructureerde ontwikkelcyclus

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#CACACA" text_font_size="12px" text_line_height="1.6em" background_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.02)" custom_padding="20px|20px|20px|20px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(200,144,10,0.3)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]

Module 2

Individueel ontwikkeltraject opbouwen

  • Focus samen met speler bepalen
  • Helder traject opzetten (4–6 weken)
  • Structuur aanbrengen in de ontwikkeling
  • Voortgang bijhouden

Doel: je begeleidt spelers met duidelijke focus, doel en tijdlijn

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_3" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#CACACA" text_font_size="12px" text_line_height="1.6em" background_color="rgba(255,255,255,0.02)" custom_padding="20px|20px|20px|20px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(200,144,10,0.3)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]

Module 3

Performance Coaching en Sessies

  • 1-op-1 sessies opbouwen en uitvoeren
  • Werken met spelers die zichzelf analyseerden
  • Spelers helpen reflecteren op eigen gedrag
  • Ontwikkeling koppelen aan data

Doel: effectieve 1-op-1 sessies en begeleiding naar betere prestaties

Van analyse
naar impact

Zonder SmartCoach

x Je ziet fouten, maar weet niet systematisch hoe je ze benoemt

x Analyses blijven in je hoofd — leiden zelden tot actie

x Spelers weten wat ze fout doen, maar niet hoe ze het verbeteren

x Geen zichtbare progressie — voor jou en de speler

x Coaching blijft afhankelijk van gevoel en intuïtie

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.25.0"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.25.0" text_font="Poppins||||||||" text_text_color="#EFEFEF" text_font_size="14px" text_line_height="1.5em" background_color="rgba(200,144,10,0.15)" custom_padding="32px|32px|32px|32px" border_width_all="1px" border_color_all="rgba(200,144,10,0.3)" border_radii="on|4px|4px|4px|4px"]

Met SmartCoach Level Courses

✓ Je analyseert met een helder, gedeeld kader voor elke positie

✓ Je analyses leiden direct tot trainbare verbeterpunten

✓ Spelers begrijpen hun eigen gedrag en weten wat ze moeten doen

✓ Voortgang is meetbaar en zichtbaar voor iedereen

✓ Coaching is gebaseerd op data — niet op gevoel
